title: Business Support Analyst
description:
Business Support Analyst
Full Time / Permanent
Monday to Friday
On Site – Bumpers Farm, Chippenham, Wiltshire
Salary: Depending on experience
Additional pay:
Annual bonus scheme
Additional benefits:
Life assurance
Private healthcare cover
Incremental holiday entitlement
Extra paid day off for your birthday
Company sick pay scheme
Attendance bonus
Employee assistance programme
Perkbox rewards
Free fruit delivered weekly
Free onsite parking
Staff events
About us:
Executive Jet Support Ltd is a world leading provider of commercial aircraft, engines and airframe components to almost 300 operators in over 50 countries across the globe. We aim to develop long-term relationships and build trust and loyalty with our customers. We are a family-based company that is driven by pride in our company and pride in the support we provide for our customers. And we are a great company to work for!
We are seeking a highly organised and detail-oriented data analyst to join our team.
About the role:
Manage and create ETL / ELT pipelines in line with Executive Jet Support’s Power BI requirements and needs.
Assist with developing and managing current data and systems, such as Oracle, PostgreSQL and Microsoft SQL databases including maintenance and upgrades.
Create and assist with knowledge base articles for the IT team and the End users.
Assist with running Crystal Reports / Generating SQL script to import data into Quantum.
Assist with running SQL’s in Quantum to update and fix incorrect data.
Assist Senior IT Engineers with the wider range of IT tasks
Assist with any other IT tasks as required.
About you:
You will have
Experience in a similar position.
Good knowledge of MS365, general office hardware and software is a must.
Knowledge of Power BI, SQL and CRMs is essential
The ability to work in Cloud and on Premise
A strong passion in IT, Data and AI
The ability to learn processes such as downloading, analysing and extracting data from aircraft PDF document records.
A willingness to learn and develop your IT skills across multiple disciplines.
Experience working with both Linux and Windows Operating systems
Strong organisational skills with the ability to prioritise tasks effectively.
Strong analytic skills with the ability to check and analyse complex data.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
Exceptional attention to detail with a focus on accuracy in data entry.
The ability to work independently as well as part of a team.
Familiarity with general office equipment and procedures.
Excellent customer service skills.
A positive can-do attitude.
If you have the skills, drive and ambition we need and you want to be part of a growing, dynamic and professional aviation company, send us your CV and a covering letter.
Job Type: Full-time
Pay: £25,000.00-£30,000.00 per year
Work Location: In person
